title: ononis subspicata var. picardii
intro: Ononis subspicata var. picardii, a variety of the Ononis subspicata plant, is a type of wild legume found in the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis subspicata var. picardii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
